About the Department

MENU

We take care to raise our students as global citizens who benefit from Istanbul's rich business world and intellectual heritage with a dynamic, interdisciplinary approach, who are open-minded, have analytical and critical thinking skills, and who have internalized human rights and freedoms, and who can manage change, and we proudly watch the success of our graduates.
